title: Lights4fun Battery Operated Fairy Lights with 20 Micro Blue LEDs on Silver Wire
features: 20 Static micro blue LED bulbs give a cosy glow; Energy efficient, power saving LED technology
Clear Battery Box: 7 x 4 x 2cm; 3 x AA Batteries (Not Included)
description: These beautifully delicate micro fairy lights on a flexible wire are ideal for wrapping, shaping and getting creative. They look gorgeous in mason jars, wrapped around vases or wreaths and as party table decorations. Being battery operated you can display these lights almost anywhere! The silver naked wire is almost invisible, giving the appearance of little floating lights. The super bright micro LEDs stay cool to the touch so you can use these fairy lights next to fabrics, furnishings and foliage safely. These lights are designed for indoor use but you can enjoy them outside in fair weather to decorate a wreath on your door for example.
